productDisplayName: Skechers Men's Sports Blue Yellow Shoe
description: Stylish and uber cool, these Allied casual shoes from skechers add an extra bounce to your step. With a great fabric-suede-synthetic leather combination in attractive colors, coupled with an extra pair of laces, these shoes team perfectly with rugged jeans. Look spectacular and wow in these comfortable shoes all day long. Upper Fabric upper with suede and synthetic leather overlays for added durability and style Lace-up system with synthetic laces for a snug, customized Fit Sofly padded tongue and well-cushioned collar for in-step comfort and a secure fit Mesh tongue for improved ventilation Brand tab on tongue Midsole Phylon midsole for lightweight comfort and support Textile lining for extra comfort Removable footbed to accomodate an orthotic Outsole Lightweight, slip-resistant rubber outsole for better shock absorption Mutli-directional terraced ridges on the outsole with star shaped detailing for improved traction shoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, dry cloth to remove dustDo not machine washDo not store in direct sunlight
